body_txt: Caps Lock. It's that key above the Shift key with a-million-and-one uses, from showing anger to messing up case-sensitive passwords. Those used to the Shift key may have iNCORRECT lOWERCASE lETTERS because of it. Can be an indicator of a Large Ham character if this appears in a Visual Novel whenever said character is speaking. Frequently combined with swearing to make an Atomic F-Bomb . Often mistakenly used as cruise control for "cool." Generally speaking, using Caps Lock on the internet denotes screaming and is considered appropriate only as a means of occasional emphasis, including on this Very Wiki. Might overlap with Once More, with Volume! , as the repeated sentence in louder volume tends to be rendered in all caps. Similarly to the trend mentioned in the article on all lowercase letters , going into the 2020s it's becoming decently popular to style album titles and the songs within them in all uppercase. It's especially common among rappers, likely starting with alternative-adjacent artists like Death Grips and JPEGMafia and later spreading to more mainstream acts like Kanye West and Playboi Carti . Sub-Trope of Painting the Medium . Compare Think in Text . Contrast all lowercase letters .
